parameters.content:
## Contact Data Validation

This section validates and standardizes key customer contact fields. Email addresses are cleaned and checked for format accuracy, while phone numbers are normalized into international structure for consistent storage, reporting and future communication workflows.

## Duplicate Detection & Enrichment

This section improves CRM accuracy by detecting possible duplicate records and enriching incomplete customer data. It helps prevent repeated leads, reduces database clutter and automatically fills missing company values for cleaner and more complete CRM records.

## Quality Rules & Flagging

This section evaluates each CRM record against business quality rules and generates warning flags such as invalid email, invalid phone, duplicate entry or missing company information. It enables proactive data governance and cleaner CRM operations.

## Workflow Overview & Setup Guide

This workflow automatically audits CRM records from Zoho CRM using a scheduled trigger. At the selected interval, it fetches leads or contacts and processes each record individually. Email addresses are validated and standardized, phone numbers are normalized, duplicate records are identified and missing company names are enriched.

After processing, business rules assign quality flags such as invalid email, duplicate record, missing company or invalid phone. A reporting node generates a structured summary, which is then converted into a clean HTML report and automatically sent via email for easy review.

**Recommended Setup Steps:**
**1.** Connect your Zoho CRM credentials in n8n.
**2.** Select Leads or Contacts module.
**3.** Configure the Schedule Trigger (hourly, every 4 hours or daily).
**4.** Configure Email (SMTP/Gmail) credentials.
**5.** Test with a limited record batch first.
**6.** Review summary reports.
**7.** Adjust validation rules as business needs evolve.

## CRM Data Intake & Trigger

This section automatically starts the workflow on a defined schedule and retrieves lead or contact records from Zoho CRM. It ensures CRM data is reviewed regularly for validation, duplicate detection, enrichment and quality monitoring without requiring manual execution.

## Record Parsing & Preparation

This section converts CRM records into individual workflow items so each record can be processed independently. It ensures scalable handling of large datasets and prepares records for downstream validation and transformation logic.

parameters.jsCode:
const records = JSON.parse($json.records || '[]');
return records.map(r => ({ json: r }));

parameters.content:
## Reporting & Analytics

This section aggregates processed records into a summary report showing valid entries, duplicates, incomplete records and validation issues. It provides a quick operational view of CRM data health and helps teams track improvement over time.

## HTML Report Formatting

This section converts the generated JSON summary and record data into a structured and visually readable HTML report. It formats key metrics and detailed records into tables and sections, making the output suitable for email delivery and quick business review.

## Email Notification & Delivery
This section sends the formatted HTML report via email to designated recipients. It ensures stakeholders receive automated CRM data quality insights directly in their inbox on a scheduled basis, enabling timely monitoring and action.

parameters.jsCode:
const { summary, report } = items[0].json; let rows = report.map(r => { const statusColor = r.status === 'VALID' ? '#16a34a' : '#dc2626'; return ` ${r.id || ''} ${r.name || ''} ${r.email || ''} ${r.country || ''} ${r.status} ${(r.flags || []).join(', ') || '-'} `; }).join(''); const html = `

📊 CRM Data Quality Report

Summary

Total Records: ${summary.total_records}

Valid Records: ${summary.valid_records}

Invalid Emails: ${summary.invalid_email}

Invalid Phones: ${summary.invalid_phone}

Duplicates: ${summary.duplicates}

Missing Company: ${summary.missing_company}

Details

${rows}
ID Name Email Country Status Flags

Generated automatically by n8n workflow

`; return [{ json: { html } }];
